params.context: Batch F-20: aidot probe (Phase 1 URL discovery + accessibility check). SKT 에이닷 (A.) AI 비서 — Korean telco AI assistant. Web channel + mobile app (web priority for Phase 1). APF NOT YET REGISTERED. Try URLs in order.

devtools_check_instructions: 1. Try URLs in order — first reachable wins
3. Anonymous mode 시도, 로그인 필요 시 (likely SKT account) report
4. If accessible: find chat/prompt input + send + capture
5. Capture (a) confirmed URL, (b) endpoint, (c) Content-Type, (d) response format snippet

notes: Batch F-20 aidot Phase 1 probe — APF unregistered, last of 5 NEEDS_HAR_CAPTURE batch.
